scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.cf:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler dev --test-scheduled
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.cf:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
